common.appDescription: A calm command center for every task.

landing.description: Track tasks, approvals, and agent health in one unified command center. Get real-time signals when work changes, without losing the thread of execution.
landing.surfaceTitle: Ship work without losing the thread.
landing.surfaceDescription: Tasks, approvals, and agent status stay synced across the board.

signals.agentDelta: Agent Delta moved task to review

featureCards.boardsDescription: Keep tasks, priorities, dependencies, and ownership visible at a glance.
featureCards.approvalsDescription: Queue, comment, and approve without losing context or slowing execution.
featureCards.signalsDescription: See work change as it happens: tasks, agent status, and approvals update live.
featureCards.auditDescription: Every decision leaves a trail, so the board stays explainable and reviewable.

landing.ctaTitle: Start with one board. Grow into a control room.
landing.ctaDescription: Onboard a board, name a lead agent, and keep approvals and signals visible from day one.
landing.footerDesc: A calm command center for boards, agents, and approvals.
landing.activityHint: When updates happen, they will show up here.

dashboard.signedOut: Sign in to access the dashboard.
dashboard.activityHint: When updates happen, they will show up here.

boardsPage.title: Boards
boardsPage.description: Manage boards and task workflows. {count, plural, =1 {1 board} other {# boards}} total.

emptyState.title: No boards yet
emptyState.description: Create your first board to start routing tasks and monitoring work across agents.

delete.title: Delete board
delete.description: This will remove {name}. This action cannot be undone.

agentsPage.title: Agents
agentsPage.adminOnlyMessage: Only organization owners and admins can access agents.

emptyState.title: No agents yet
emptyState.description: Create your first agent to start executing tasks on this board.

delete.title: Delete agent
delete.description: This will remove {name}. This action cannot be undone.

gatewaysPage.title: Gateways
gatewaysPage.description: Manage OpenClaw gateway connections used by boards
gatewaysPage.adminOnlyMessage: Only organization owners and admins can access gateways.

emptyState.title: No gateways yet
emptyState.description: Create your first gateway to connect boards and start managing your OpenClaw connections.

delete.title: Delete gateway?
delete.description: This removes the gateway connection from Mission Control. Boards using it will need a new gateway assigned.

localAuth.title: Local Authentication
localAuth.subtitle: Enter your access token to unlock Mission Control.

errors.tokenLength: Bearer token must be at least {length} characters.
errors.reachFailed: Unable to reach backend to validate token.

localAuth.tokenHint: Token must be at least {length} characters.

activityPage.title: Activity

emptyState.title: No activity yet
emptyState.description: Activity will appear here when events are emitted.

activityPage.noActivityDesc: Activity will appear here as it happens

approvalsPage.title: Approvals

emptyState.title: No approvals pending
emptyState.description: Approvals will appear here when they require your attention.

approvalsPage.noApprovals: No approvals to review right now. New approvals will show up here as soon as they arrive.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Update your profile and account preferences.
settingsPage.signInMessage: Sign in to manage your settings.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Keep your identity and timezone up to date.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: This permanently removes your Mission Control account and related personal data. This action cannot be undone.
delete.confirmDescription: Your account and personal data will be permanently deleted.

signInPage.title: Sign In
signInPage.description: Sign in to access Mission Control

errors.unknown: An error occurred. Please try again.

skillPacksPage.title: Skill Packs
skillPacksPage.noPacksDescription: Add your first skill URL pack to get started.
skillPacksPage.deleteDescription: This will remove {name} from your pack list. This action cannot be undone.
skillPacksPage.adminOnlyMessage: Only organization owners and admins can manage skill packs.
skillPacksPage.signInMessage: Sign in to manage skill packs.

boardGroupsPage.title: Board Groups
boardGroupsPage.signInMessage: Sign in to view board groups.
boardGroupsPage.noGroupsDesc: Create a board group to increase cross-board visibility for agents.
boardGroupsPage.deleteDesc: This will remove {name} from your group list. This action cannot be undone.

tagsPage.title: Tags
tagsPage.noTagsDesc: Create your first tag to get started
tagsPage.adminOnlyMessage: Only organization owners and admins can manage tags.

emptyState.title: No tags yet
emptyState.description: Create tags to classify and group tasks across your boards.

delete.title: Delete tag
delete.description: This will remove {name} from all tagged tasks. This action cannot be undone.

customFieldsPage.title: Custom Fields
customFieldsPage.noFieldsDesc: Create your first custom field to get started
customFieldsPage.signInMessage: Sign in to manage custom fields.
customFieldsPage.adminOnlyMessage: Only organization owners and admins can manage custom fields.

emptyState.title: No custom fields yet
emptyState.description: Create organization-level custom fields that appear on every task.

delete.title: Delete custom field
delete.description: This will delete {name}. This action cannot be undone.

skillsMarketplacePage.title: Skills Marketplace
skillsMarketplacePage.noSkillsDesc: Skills will appear here once added

organizationPage.title: Organization
organizationPage.signInMessage: Sign in to manage your organization.
